'''Sebban Keto''' was a descendant of the [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] legacy who owned several shops in [[Cinnagar/Legends|Cinnagar]], [[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta's]] capital. Sebban, much like his relatives [[Satal Keto/Legends|Satal]] and [[Aleema Keto|Aleema]], practiced [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] [[Magic/Legends|magic]], and established a new [[Krath/Legends|Krath]] cult on Empress Teta several thousand [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]].
